description: A feature-rich messaging app with AI-powered tools, expressive typing, media sharing, and beautiful themes.

features.name: AI Composer
features.description: Enhances your messages using AI. Improve grammar, change tone (friendly, formal, funny, poetic, concise), or translate messages before sending.
features.howToUse: In any chat, type your message then tap the sparkle/AI icon in the toolbar above the keyboard. Choose an action: Enhance, Grammar Fix, Tone Change, or Translate.
features.navigation: Chat Screen → AI Toolbar (sparkle icon above keyboard)

features.name: Live Expressive Typing
features.description: Your typing is animated in real-time for the recipient. Characters appear with smooth animations as you type, making conversations feel alive.
features.howToUse: This is automatic. When you type in a chat, the other person sees your keystrokes with fluid animations in real-time.

features.name: Real-time Sentiment Animation
features.description: The chat background subtly changes based on the emotional tone of the conversation. Uses AI to detect sentiment and animates color shifts.
features.howToUse: Automatic — the background gently shifts colors based on conversation mood (warm for positive, cool for neutral, etc.).

features.name: Message Translation
features.description: Translate any received message into your preferred language using AI-powered translation.
features.howToUse: Long-press on any message → tap 'Translate' from the context menu. Choose your target language.

features.name: Speech-to-Text (Voice Input)
features.description: Convert voice messages to text or use voice input for composing messages.
features.howToUse: Tap the microphone icon in the input bar to start voice input. Speak your message and it will be converted to text.
features.navigation: Chat → Mic icon in input bar

features.name: Text-to-Speech (TTS)
features.description: Listen to any message read aloud using text-to-speech.
features.howToUse: Long-press a message → tap the speaker/TTS icon to have the message read aloud.

features.name: Themes & Wallpapers
features.description: Customize the app's appearance with multiple built-in themes (including Pastel Sky) and chat wallpapers.
features.howToUse: Go to Settings → Appearance → Themes to pick a theme. For wallpapers, go to Settings → Chat Settings → Wallpaper.

features.name: Media Sharing
features.description: Share photos, videos, documents, and media groups (collages). Supports camera capture and gallery picking.
features.howToUse: In a chat, tap the attachment icon (paperclip) to pick media from gallery, or tap the camera icon to take a photo/video.

features.name: Swipe to Reply
features.description: Swipe right on any message to reply to it directly, creating a quoted reply.
features.howToUse: Swipe right on a message bubble to activate reply mode. The quoted message appears above the input bar.

features.name: Buzz (Attention Nudge)
features.description: Send a buzz to get someone's attention. Their phone vibrates with a special notification.
features.howToUse: In a chat, tap the thunder/buzz icon in the toolbar to send a buzz to the other person.

features.name: Online Presence & Last Seen
features.description: See when contacts are online or their last seen time. Green dot = online, timestamp = last active.
features.howToUse: Open any chat — the status appears below the contact name in the toolbar (Online, or 'Last seen ...').

features.name: Typing Indicators
features.description: See when someone is typing a message to you with animated dots.
features.howToUse: Automatic — when the other person types, you see '...' or 'typing' below their name.

features.name: Read Receipts & Delivery Status
features.description: Messages show delivery and read status: single check (sent), double check (delivered), blue checks (read).
features.howToUse: Look at the check marks next to your sent messages. Grey = sent, double grey = delivered, blue = read.

features.name: Delete for Everyone
features.description: Delete messages for all participants within 48 hours of sending.
features.howToUse: Long-press your sent message → tap 'Delete' → choose 'Delete for Everyone'.
features.navigation: Chat → Long-press own message → Delete → Delete for Everyone

features.name: Profile & Avatar
features.description: Set your profile photo, display name, and about text. Your avatar syncs across all chats.
features.howToUse: Go to Settings → Profile. Tap your photo to change it, edit your name or about text.

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Push notifications for new messages, buzzes, and other events. Customizable per-chat notification settings.
features.howToUse: Notifications work automatically. To customize, go to Settings → Notifications, or mute specific chats.

features.name: Archive Chats
features.description: Archive chats to hide them from the main list without deleting them.
features.howToUse: Long-press a chat in the chat list → tap 'Archive'. View archived chats at the bottom of the chat list.

features.name: Search Chats
features.description: Search through your conversations to find specific messages or contacts.
features.howToUse: Tap the search icon at the top of the chat list. Type keywords to find messages or contacts.

features.name: Glyph AI Agent
features.description: Your built-in AI assistant with three modes: General Chat (ask anything), Chat Intelligence (search across your conversations), and App Help (get help with Glyph features).
features.howToUse: From the chat list, tap the 'Glyph AI' pinned card at the top. Switch between Chat, Search, and App Help modes using the chips at the top.
features.navigation: Chat List → Glyph AI card (pinned at top)
